scripts.build: esbuild src/content.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/content.js --format=iife && esbuild src/background.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/background.js --format=iife && cp manifest.json dist/ && cp -r icons dist/
scripts.verify: pnpm run fmt:check && pnpm run lint && pnpm run test:run
scripts.package:local: pnpm run build && cd dist && zip -r ../kotdiff-chrome-local.zip . && zip -r ../kotdiff-firefox-local.xpi .
